name: appointment_scheduling
description: Patient wants to schedule a doctor's appointment

persona.name: Alice Decker
persona.personality: Polite, cooperative patient who answers questions directly

initial_message: Hi, I need to schedule a doctor's appointment.

responses.reply: Yes, I have Blue Cross Blue Shield insurance.
I'd like to come in next Tuesday if that's available.
Morning would be best for me, around 10 or 11 AM if possible.
I've been having headaches for the past week and I'd like to get checked out.
Yes, that works perfectly. Thank you!
